sections.heading: Reaction Trigger
sections.text: Values above 0.27 sccm trigger the plan. Values above 0.30 sccm are product nonconforming. Measurement range remains a separate concept.

sections.heading: Containment Sequence
sections.text: Hold the current lot, identify the last known good verification, verify the master leak, inspect fixture seals and verify the released program version.

sections.heading: Verification and Release
sections.text: Repeat the golden sample, perform 100% re-screening when required, create a deviation, notify Quality Engineering and release only after evidence approval.
